nasb.text: Therefore the Lord has recompensed me according to my righteousness, According to the cleanness of my hands in His eyes.

esv.text: So the Lord has rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in his sight.

cnv.text: 所以耶和華按著我的公義， 照著我在他眼前手中的清潔回報我。

ccb.text: 耶和华因我公义、 在祂面前清白而奖赏我。

csbs.text: 所以耶和华照着我的公义， 在他眼前照着我手中的清洁回报我。
